        "subaction": "create",
        "schedule": {

          "duration": "PT30M",
          "title": "Deep Work"

      }
    }

}

To cancel the tentative launch checklist sync next Thursday (2026-05-15), you need to delete the existing calendar event.

**Action:** Delete event
**Bundle:** `com.apple.Safari`
**Parameters:**
- `event_id`: [Insert event ID from your calendar]
- `event_title`: "Launch Checklist Sync"
- `event_date`: "2026-05-15"
- `event_time`: [Insert time]
- `event_location`: [Insert location]

**Note:** If you do not have the event ID, you can also search for the event using the `search` action with the title "Launch Checklist Sync" and date "2026-05-15" to retrieve the ID before deleting.
